SUBJECT: Affiliates: I've got a weird problem...

NAME,

OK, yesterday we released our SMARTS Social Media video... and we have gotten 100% non-stop RAVE reviews.

I mean it's crazy - like we are over 70
comments, and EVERY single one of them is a rave.

That's my "weird" problem - it's getting to the point where I'm thinking of getting my staff to go in and make up some negative comments so it looks more "real".

(And no, I don't need you to do in and make
any negative posts for me!   :-)

I mean, when was the last time that ANY blog in the Internet Marketing world had 100% positive comments? You can see the comments
here:

http:// link to comments from "you don't know nothing" post


So why am I telling you all this?

Because it means if you send your list to the video, they will LOVE it... and they're going to love you for telling them about it.

And then you are going to make a boatload of money when the launch goes live... remember we are tracking by cookie AND by opt-in, so if you send them to that page, we will close them for you.

Here is your affiliate link to the video:

http:// AFF link to video


I have some swipe copy below for you, but first I have a few more critical details about the launch...

IMPORTANT #1: We are starting to get lots of questions from affiliates about bonuses.
Here's a few groundrules...

- Please make the bonuses relevant to the product. We have seen over and over that affiliates do better when their bonuses are tied to the product. In this case, if your product has something to do with Social Media and Web 2.0, it will be a winner.

- We are NOT allowing rebates or cash back offers. There might be rare exceptions to this (such as if people are part of a high-priced coaching program or something like that), but you need to get it pre-approved by me before hand. No exceptions.


IMPORTANT #2: We are going to have a KILLER affiliate contest. We will be releasing the prize list very soon.


IMPORTANT #3: The JV Blog - the best way to get the latest information on this launch is by keeping an eye on our JV Blog:
http://link to jv blog.


IMPORTANT #4: We are going live on Friday, January 11th at 12:00 noon eastern time.


If you have any questions or comments, let me know... you can reach me via email at: TOMS EMAIL or on my cell at: TOMS CELL


best regards,
Tom Ham
